quests.name: Observe the Herd at Dawn
objectives: Stay within 500u of herd without startling them
quests.reward: Herd behavior knowledge — predict migration timing

quests.name: The Herd Moves

objectives.description: Lead the herd along the migration corridor (3 waypoints)
objectives.mechanic: Player makes noise/throws rocks to steer herd direction

objectives.description: Reach Zone B safe grazing area before T-Rex enters exclusion zone

quests.failure_condition: T-Rex reaches Brachio herd before player escorts them to Zone B
quests.reward: Tribe trust +2, unlock Zone B camp access

npc_voice.line: The herd is moving. I saw the great lizards walking west before dawn. If the thunder beast comes from the ridge, they will be trapped. You must go ahead — make noise, drive them to the river valley. We cannot lose the herd. Without them, we starve before the cold season.

quests.name: Warn the Tribe

objectives.description: Detect Raptor breach at northern exclusion boundary
objectives.mechanic: Player sees Raptors crossing orange exclusion light marker

objectives.description: Sprint to tribe camp before Raptors arrive
objectives.time_pressure: Raptors travel at 2.5x player speed — player has ~45 seconds

objectives.mechanic: Interact with NPC_TribeElder_QuestGiver to trigger camp scatter

quests.failure_condition: Raptors reach camp before player warns tribe
quests.reward: Tribe trust +3, tribe scouts begin patrolling raptor boundary

npc_voice.line: Run! The fanged ones — they crossed the stone boundary to the north. I counted three, maybe four. The camp is not safe. You must warn the others before they reach the sleeping ground. Go now. Do not stop.

quests.name: First Blood

objectives.mechanic: Pick up resource actors (Rock_Pickup, Stick_Pickup) near craft station

objectives.description: Craft a Stone Axe at the craft station
objectives.mechanic: Press C near craft station to open crafting menu — select Stone Axe recipe

objectives.description: Hunt a small dinosaur in the hunt zone
objectives.target: Juvenile Raptor (1 hit kill with Stone Axe)
objectives.mechanic: Stealth approach + single strike — or throw rock to distract first

quests.reward: Stone Axe (permanent), meat resource, unlock crafting system
quests.design_note: This quest teaches the full crafting loop: gather → craft → use. Emotional beat: player's first kill is a small, vulnerable creature — intentional moral weight.

npc_requiring_full_dialogue.role: Quest giver for Quests 3, 4, 5 — tribe elder who tracks predator movements and assigns survival tasks
npc_requiring_full_dialogue.personality: Pragmatic, experienced, no-nonsense — survival is the only philosophy
quest_lines_needed: Quest 3 intro: send player to escort herd
Quest 4 intro: alarm at raptor breach
Quest 4 success: gratitude + warning about future breaches
Quest 5 intro: teach player to craft first weapon
Quest 5 success: acknowledge player as hunter

npc_requiring_full_dialogue.role: Tribe scout — first contact NPC, warns player about predator zones
npc_requiring_full_dialogue.personality: Young, nervous, eager to prove worth to tribe

lore_hooks: Why does the tribe track the Brachio herd? — Brachio migration predicts seasonal changes
What happened to the previous tribe camp? — Destroyed by T-Rex territorial expansion
Why do Raptors keep pushing north? — Their southern territory was flooded
